concerns: Step 4 is ambiguous — pick one routing approach upfront. Given 4 planned routes (home, browse, play, guide), react-router-dom is the pragmatic choice over a custom hash router that will need replacing later. Commit to one.

Introducing client-side routing requires Vite SPA fallback configuration (historyApiFallback or equivalent) so that direct navigation to /guide doesn't 404 in production. The plan doesn't mention this.

Step 5 says 'Update Nav.tsx' but the /guide link already exists — the real work is converting all <a> tags to <Link> components (or onClick handlers). Clarify that this is a routing integration step, not adding a new link.

The acceptance criteria mention 'etiquette' as a section, but the play_guide.md content has etiquette as a bullet under 'Rituals', not a standalone section. Ensure the component structure satisfies AC literally — consider making etiquette a visible subsection or renaming to match.
